context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the define-domain-language instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the domain language is fuzzy, overloaded, or inconsistent.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Choose canonical terms:** Prefer the clearest business term; keep aliases only as migration notes or search hints.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define each term:** Write one short definition, expected invariants, and related concepts.
